Categories > Books > Harry Potter

The time has come

by Vanir

Harry escapes britain, and learns the truth about the weirdest heritage ever.

Category: Harry Potter - Rating: PG-13 - Genres: Erotica,Fantasy,Parody - Characters: Fleur,Ginny,Harry,Hermione,Luna - Published: 2007-09-10 - Updated: 2007-09-13 - 4037 words

Harry opened his eyes to the sharp light of a Norwegian dawn and blinked.

The world was wide and strange.
